input.tenant_message: I just noticed a thin wisp of smoke coming from the electrical panel in my utility closet and there's a faint burnt smell around it. I haven't touched anything. I'm in the apartment right now and not sure if I should leave. Please respond urgently.

ai_output.recommended_action: Immediately instruct the tenant to evacuate the unit and call 911 — smoke from an electrical panel indicates active arcing or a burning breaker and is a fire emergency. Do not attempt to open or touch the panel. Contact the utility company to request an emergency shutoff if the fire department does not respond within minutes. Dispatch a licensed electrician only after the fire department clears the scene.
